beats.label: Homepage overview
beats.caption: Pelian homepage showing AI development services
beats.narrationText: Pelian builds end-to-end AI solutions that transform businesses.

beats.label: Navigate to services
beats.caption: Clicking 'Our services' in navigation
beats.narrationText: Let's explore their AI services portfolio.

beats.label: Services section
beats.caption: AI services section with categories
beats.narrationText: They offer agent orchestration, voice AI, and custom applications - all built to integrate seamlessly.

beats.label: Scroll to work
beats.caption: Scrolling down to 'Our work' section
beats.narrationText: Now let's see their portfolio of completed projects.

beats.label: Preview Juno project
beats.caption: Hovering over Juno Maternal Health Agent project
beats.narrationText: Here's Juno - a maternal health AI agent they built for healthcare.

beats.label: Open Juno details
beats.caption: Clicking on Juno project card
beats.narrationText: Let's dive into this healthcare AI solution.

beats.label: Juno project page
beats.caption: Juno project details page loads
beats.narrationText: This shows how Pelian builds specialized AI agents that deliver measurable results in critical industries like healthcare.

beats.label: Demo conclusion
beats.caption: Juno project page displayed
beats.narrationText: That's how Pelian transforms ideas into AI-powered products - from healthcare agents to enterprise solutions, delivered in weeks with proven results.
